message:
Add comprehensive TUI component test coverage

Test Suite Overview:
Adds unit tests for all TUI components to ensure visual consistency and
keyboard handling works correctly across the interface. Total: ~3,368 lines
of test code across 7 test files.

internal/tui/tui_test.go (114 lines)
- TestNew: Verify model initialization
- TestModelInit: Verify Init() returns appropriate command
- TestModelInitNilInner: Handle nil inner model gracefully
- TestModelUpdate: Verify window size handling
- TestModelUpdateNilInner: Handle nil inner model in Update
- TestModelView: Verify view rendering

internal/tui/components/components_test.go (831 lines)
AgentCard tests:
- NewAgentCard initialization with defaults
- Method chaining (AsCompact, AsSelected, WithWidth)
- Status rendering (active/idle/stale)
- View output contains expected elements

CommandBox tests:
- Initialization with command text
- Width handling and truncation
- Syntax highlighting (if enabled)
- Copy hint rendering

RiskIndicator tests:
- Tier badge colors (CRITICAL=red, DANGEROUS=orange, etc.)
- Icon fallbacks (emoji vs ASCII)
- Compact vs full rendering modes

StatusBadge tests:
- All status types (pending, approved, rejected, executed, etc.)
- Color consistency with theme

Spinner tests:
- Animation frame cycling
- Style application

Table tests:
- Column width calculation
- Row rendering and selection
- Scrolling behavior
- Empty state handling

Timeline tests:
- State transition rendering
- Timestamp formatting
- Compact vs expanded views

internal/tui/dashboard/dashboard_test.go (360 lines)
- Model initialization with project path
- Panel focus cycling (tab/shift+tab)
- Arrow key navigation
- Selection movement within panels
- Refresh message handling
- Error state rendering
- Keybinding coverage for all shortcuts

internal/tui/icons/icons_test.go (297 lines)
- All icon constants have values
- ASCII fallback availability
- Icon selection based on terminal capability
- Tier and status icon mapping

internal/tui/request/request_test.go (1,013 lines)
- Detail view rendering with all fields
- Justification section display
- Dry-run output rendering
- Reviews list formatting
- Approve action handling
- Reject action with reason input
- Copy command functionality
- Keybinding tests (a/r/c/ESC)
- Empty/missing field handling

internal/tui/styles/styles_test.go (425 lines)
- Base style application
- Color scheme consistency
- Border and padding values
- Gradient rendering tests
- Shimmer effect tests
- Style inheritance

internal/tui/theme/theme_test.go (328 lines)
- Catppuccin Mocha colors
- Catppuccin Macchiato colors
- Catppuccin Latte (light theme) colors
- Theme switching
- Color contrast validation
- Tier color mapping
- Status color mapping
